title: The Straw Hats Escape — Part 3
description: Dressrosa’s allies protect Luffy as the crew runs toward departure.
scene: On pages 11–15, Rebecca, Kyros, Viola, Luffy, Trafalgar Law deal with the aftermath of Dressrosa, with the Marines, allies, and citizens responding to the truth.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Rebecca!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I'm going to leave you on the back side of the hill; I'll be your decoy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You've gotta go the rest of the way yourself! The whole country's after us trying to protect you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: If you get caught, you'll be taken back to the palace!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Got it! Thank you!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: Thank you! Lucy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Shishishi! Don't mention it!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: Capture Lucy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Save Lady Rebecca!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I guess once a pirate, always a pirate!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: We thought you were our hero !!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I ain't trusting no pirates no more!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Scarlet, my duty here is done.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I apologize for lying about who your SIGT NIFICANT OTHER AND REBECA'S FATHER IS.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: was for the sake of her happiness.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Because she was part of the Royal Family, she fled, from place to place, slightest at every turn, for 10 long years.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: And that is why, now, I want her to have the happiness she deserves as a child of the royal family.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: I... I can't stay here anymore.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Rebecca!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Just stop with all the lying already!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Ahh... you mean the letter? I wasn't lying.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: I really was, even if it was a long time ago, quite the villain...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: I fought everyone and anyone I could...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: and motives and whatnot aside, it's also a fact that I killed a man.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: I'm not some posh Prince's son!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: I don't know any- one like that!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: I don't care how many hundreds of people you've killed...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: I don't care if your hands are stained blood red. I only have one dad in this world!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: I am kyros's daughter!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: So... stop lying...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: until the day that you can be happy...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: I will remain by your side!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: Stay by my side, soldier- San!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: Are you sure you want someone like me as your father?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: Yes! Let's live...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: Together!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: Rebecca will not be...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: Returning to the Palace, Father.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: Viola! I had feared as much, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: Yes... this is what she wishes for.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: I'm sorry, Viola-san!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: But can you be Princess instead!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: A strange request indeed.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: This is the second time someone's asked that of me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: Is that so?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #46
dialogue.text: I guess the Apple doesn't fall far from the tree.

summary: This part follows the consequences of Dressrosa’s liberation and shows how the victory changes the country and the wider world.
